title: Savory Crispy Saudi Arabian Beef Skewers
description: A yeasty, crispy, nostalgic Saudi-Arabian dish featuring Thai holy basil krapao, resting on a bed of rice, and served with a side of cucumber salad, all prepared in a Buddhist temple friendly manner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, olive oil, garlic, ginger, yeast, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15 minutes.
While the beef is cooking, heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a pan over medium heat and saute the chopped Thai holy basil krapao until fragrant.
Serve the beef skewers on a bed of cooked rice, topped with the sauteed Thai holy basil krapao and a side of sliced cucumber.
Garnish with additional Thai holy basil krapao if desired.
